meaning: n.衣服,哑弹,无用物,<俗> 失败的人或事adj.无用的
examples: The original metaphor practice was a dud.
But Jobs likely knew he had a dud on his hands; consumers, for their part, hated it.
But it does nothing to reduce the risks that the movie will be a box-office dud.
For stock pickers in particular, this may not be a dud market after all.
